text:
Tang Thanh Trung
Ho Chi Minh City | thanhtrung22052004@gmail.com | 0773 735 100 | Portfolio | LinkedIn | GitHub
About Me
Desired Position: Backend Developer Intern
I am an Information Technology student applying for a Backend Developer position. My goal is to contribute to
the company through responsibility , continuous learning, and teamwork, while improving my professional skills in
a real working environment. I am willing to adapt to new requirements and make continuous efforts to meet the
company’s expectations.
Technologies
Languages: Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, C#
Frameworks: Spring Boot, NestJS, Django, .NET Core, ReactJS, NextJS
Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
Tools: Kafka, Docker, Git, Postman, RESTful APIs
Projects
Recruitment Web Platform (Personal Project)
• Developed a recruitment platform where users can register as candidates or employers.
• Integrated secure authentication using JWT.
• Admins can manage users, job posts, and employer profiles.

• Admins can manage users, job posts, and employer profiles.
• Employers can search for suitable candidates, and candidates can search for desired job positions.
• Tech Stack: NestJS, NextJS, MongoDB, JWT
• Frontend: https://github.com/ttt2205/UI-Job-Recruitment-NextJS-KLTN
• Backend: https://github.com/ttt2205/Job-Recruitment-NestJS-KLTN
Recruitment Web Platform (Team Project, Lead Developer)
• Led a team of 4 to refactor the project from a NestJS monolith to Spring Boot microservices.
• Migrated the database from MongoDB to MySQL with normalized schemas.
• Implemented a real-time messaging feature and Kafka-based notifications for job updates and chats.
• Added a feature that allows candidates to automatically generate AI-powered CVs tailored to specific job
positions using prompt engineering techniques.
• Tech Stack: Spring Boot, Spring Security , MySQL, Kafka, JWT, WebSocket, NextJS
• Frontend: https://github.com/ttt2205/UI-Job-Recruitment-NextJS-KLTN

• Frontend: https://github.com/ttt2205/UI-Job-Recruitment-NextJS-KLTN
• Backend: https://github.com/ttt2205/BE_Job_Recruitment_Platform_Spring_Boot_Microservice
Dormitory Management System (Team Project, Lead Developer)
• Developed a comprehensive dormitory management system including member management, area
management, room management, expense management, and analytics dashboards.
• Implemented security using JWT for authentication.
• Applied RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) for permission management.
• Tech Stack: Spring Boot, Spring Security (JWT), MySQL, RESTful API
• Frontend: gitgithub.com/ttt2205/QL_KTX_FE
• Backend: https://github.com/ttt2205/QL_KTX_BE
Certifications
TOEIC – Score: 650 2025
Education
Saigon University, Software Engineering 2022 – Present
• GPA: 3.07 / 4.0
